word: G1358 - διορύσσω - diorýssō - dee-or-oos'-so - Break through

sections.paragraph:
- Original: διορύσσω

- Transliteration: Diorusso

- Phonetic: dee-or-oos'-so

- Definition:

1. to dig through: a house

- Origin: from G1223 and G3736

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1223 and G3736; to penetrate burglariously: - break through (up).
